name: Albert
bio:
Young Pope of the Spirit Heroes Faction with extraordinary magic skills. He controls the power of light to bring hope and light to the battlefield, while protecting and supporting allies.

Role: Shield Buff
Specialty: A mid-backline Support-type hero that provides shields for allies to resist damage; increases the damage reduction of all allies immediately after entering the battlefield.

skillSlots.name: Church Blessing
skillSlots.description: Albert grants [Blessed Shield] to 2 allies with lowest HP, absorbing 200% of Albert's ATK as DMG for 2 turns, non-stackable and undispellable.

skillSlots.name: Holy Covenant
skillSlots.description: Deals 50% M.DMG to all enemies and grants [Blessed Shield] to 3 allies with lowest HP, absorbing 200% of Albert's ATK as DMG for 2 turns, non-stackable, undispellable.

effects.name: Energy Inversion
effects.description: Allies with [Blessed Shield] gain 10% Final DMG RED and Effect Resist Rate.

effects.name: Energy Inversion
effects.description: [Holy Covenant] grants [Final DMG II] to the ally with highest ATK.

effects.name: Energy Inversion
effects.description: [Blessed Shield] deals 50% of Albert's ATK as M.DMG to 1 random enemy when disappearing, with 40% probability to inflict [Holy Seal].

effects.name: Energy Inversion
effects.description: [Holy Covenant] grants [Blessed Shield] to all teammates.
